name: Frolic Water Adapter 14mm
summary: Frolic Water Adapter 14mm — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Water pipe connection accessory for the Frolic Thermal Extractor, enabling compatibility with 14 mm glass setups for smoother, water-cooled vapour delivery. The Frolic 14 mm Water Adapter is a dedicated filtration accessory that allows the Frolic Thermal Extractor to be used with standard 14 mm female glass joints. By routing vapour through water, it reduces temperature and harshness while preserving the device’s original airflow adjustment and performance. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
